creator: jsa@wickedmachine.net
text:
Bump exaile-devel to 2.99.2 (aka 0.3 Alpha 2).

While I am here, do some better sorting of the plist to make it easier for future maintenance.

There's a known issue with the collection manager, where adding an album to the playlist causes the album entry to duplicate.  Does not affect usability.

Fix: Remove file:
	files/patch-Makefile
